'''Mia Ikova''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the elected leader of [[Haleoda]]on [[Kattada/Legends|Kattada]] and also served as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sympathizer during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="E:PW">''[[Star Wars: Empire: Princess... Warrior]]''</ref>

==Biography==
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] Mia Ikova served as the leader of [[Haleoda]],<ref name="CSWE" /> the primary [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kattada/Legends|Kattada]],<ref name="Haleoda">{{CSWECite|II|8|Haleoda}}</ref> and ostensibly the planet in the [[Local year|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. She attempted to remain neutral in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|conflict]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]] but still provided services to the highest bidder.<ref name="CSWE" /> [[1 BBY/Legends|A year before]] the Battle of Yavin, Ikova welcomed Princess Leia Organa during her stay at Kattada. While the princess searched refuge she was found by stormtroopers and captured alongside Mia Ikova.

[[File:First_shots_fired.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Mia Ikova is shot.]]

She was shot by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Karg]] and his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and passed away in Leia's [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. Before passing away, she reminded a mourning Leia of her mission to help free [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and that Leia was not guilty for her [[Death/Legends|death]].

{{Char-stub}}
